data.title: A Clinical Assessment of the Use of RETIN-A MICRO (Tretinoin Gel) Microsphere, 0.04% in a Pump Dispenser and a 5% Benzoyl Peroxide Wash Used in the Morning Compared to the Use of RETIN-A MICRO 0.04% Pump Nightly and a 5% Benzoyl Peroxide Wash in the Morning For the Treatment of Facial Acne Vulgaris
data.brief_summary: A study to determine if using 2 acne products in the morning is as safe and efficacious as using one product in the morning and one product in the evening.
endpoints: Change From Baseline in Total Facial Acne Lesion Count
